steps.name: Reboot Terminal
steps.description: Reboots the terminal which helpful for troubleshooting and updating the terminal firmware.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the remote reboot command indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'. This status does not necessarily mean that the terminal has rebooted. The status depends on whether there are other commands in progress in the terminal and if the terminal is connected to the network.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the reboot request. For a successful request this will be 'Reboot command published successfully'.
